name: MBI Administradora General de Fondos S.A. - MBI Global Fondo de Inversion
summary: MBI Administradora General de Fondos S.A. - MBI Global Fondo de Inversion invests in global markets. MBI Administradora General de Fondos S.A. manages the fund. The fund aims to provide investors with diversification and returns through investments in a broad range of global assets.
